hooks.command: MARKER="/tmp/mos_fired_${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-default}"; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ]; then touch "$MARKER"; echo 'SYSTEM: First prompt of this session. You MUST invoke the multiskill-optimum-saver skill (via the Skill tool, skill name "multiskill-optimum-saver") NOW before answering. Run all 5 steps (config -> complexity -> skills route -> MCPs route -> status panel). After the status panel, address the user request. This is mandatory.'; fi
